projectDescription: A high-performance Astro-based hackathon platform for managing, promoting, and registering participants in the Carnero.Dev technology competition at ITR Roque.
keyFeatures: 36-hour hackathon competition at ITR Roque for TICs students
6 innovation tracks: AI, Web & Cloud, Cybersecurity, DevOps, Open Innovation, Teamwork
Real-time participant registration backed by Supabase PostgreSQL
Automated email confirmations via Resend transactional email API
Live countdown timer with GSAP-powered scroll-trigger animations
Server-rendered Astro site with Node.js standalone adapter
Interactive registration modal with client-side + server-side validation
Full rules page with evaluation rubric (100-point scoring breakdown)
Responsive cyber-tech dark aesthetic with Tailwind CSS 4
publicApiSurface: POST /api/register — registers a team with teamName, repName, repEmail, membersCount
resend.emails.send() — dispatches confirmation email to team representative
astro dev — starts local development server on port 4321
astro build — compiles production-optimized build to /dist
astro preview — previews the production build locally
SUPABASE_URL env variable — Supabase project URL
SUPABASE_ANON_KEY env variable — Supabase anonymous (publishable) key
RESEND_API_KEY env variable — Resend API key for email delivery
